title: tritoniopsis toximontana
intro: Tritoniopsis toximontana, also known as the poisonous or deadly Tritoniopsis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tritoniopsis toximontana include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution is advised due to its toxic compounds.
